revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-085

Volume velocity (across a surface element)

The product of the area of the surface element and the component of the sound particle velocity perpendicular to the surface.


Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Volume velocity}}
